decisions.decision: Run the smallest agency-comprehension sample before choosing the first playable prototype.
decisions.context: The cheaper narrative prototype is the current default, but the systemic-agency promise may justify a different first investment.
assumptions: An eight-player paper prototype can update comprehension and desire without supporting market-size claims.
risks: A convenience sample may overrepresent experienced strategy players.
decisions.rollback_trigger: Cancel or redesign the probe if it cannot expose the named player decision or if private material cannot be protected.
decisions.next_review: After the eight-session evidence gate or at the prototype-sprint deadline
decisions.information_stop_reason: Stop after the evidence gate, when the option ranking is robust, or when the sprint deadline arrives.
